'''''InQuest Gamer'' 144''' was a CCG and roleplaying magazine published by [[Wizard Entertainment]]. It featured a [[Star Wars Miniatures|SW Minis]] Killer Fleet by [[Sterling Hershey]], made up of starships from different eras.
